overview: A high-end, production-grade cinematic web experience for Attack on Titan — an interactive digital museum and story journey combining the feel of a movie, game, and story in one immersive experience.
features: 4-phase cinematic intro sequence with preloader, fog transition, wall reveal, and dramatic hero cut
Advanced character system with animated cards, cinematic modals, stats visualization, sorting and filtering
Titan database with classified military archive UI and reveal animations
Interactive stylized world map with clickable locations and tooltips
Vertical scroll storytelling timeline with per-arc backgrounds
Survey Corps Terminal with typing animations and military database UI
Multi-track audio system with volume control and auto-fade between sections
Custom blade cursor with glow and click ripple effects
Story Mode toggle for immersive autoplay narrative experience
Masonry gallery with advanced lightbox (zoom, drag, keyboard nav)
Auto-rotating quotes engine with glitch transitions
Konami code easter egg and bonus interactions
Grain/noise cinematic texture, glassmorphism panels, vignette effects
